audit_items.proof_trace: The guard `if (bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue) { revert BidValueTooLow(...); }` at L433-435 is on the single code path through `bid()` before any state mutations. `s_minBidUsdValue` is always > 0 (enforced in constructor and setter), `assetPrice` is validated non-zero/non-stale by `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)`, and `assetParams.decimals` is validated against the actual token decimals in `_applyAssetParamsUpdates`. Solidity 0.8.26 checked arithmetic prevents overflow from producing a falsely-high `bidUsdValue`.
